revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:荏原七福神]]


'''{{ill|Ebara Shichifukujin|ja|荏原七福神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebara Shichifukujin|qq=}}''' (Ebara Shichifukujin) is a pilgrimage site for the {{ill|Seven Lucky Gods|en|Seven Lucky Gods|qid=Q846858|lt=Seven Lucky Gods|1=Seven Lucky Gods}} established in 1991 (Heisei 3) with the hope of re‐examining the local region of Ebara. It offers a course of approximately 6 kilometers—taking about 2 hours—that spans east–west through {{ill|Shinagawa|en|Shinagawa|qid=Q233495|lt=Shinagawa Ward|1=Shinagawa}}, from {{ill|Ōimachi Station|en|Ōimachi Station|qid=Q801690|lt=Oimachi Station|1=Ōimachi Station}} via the {{ill|Meguro Line|en|Meguro Line|qid=Q283861|lt=Tokyu Meguro Line|1=Meguro Line}} to {{ill|Nishi-koyama Station|en|Nishi-koyama Station|qid=Q5370722|lt=Nishikoyama Station|1=Nishi-koyama Station}}.<ref>http://www.city.shinagawa.tokyo.jp/hp/page000030200/hpg000030114.htm 戸越公園の門松と七福神めぐり</ref>
== List of Ebara Seven Lucky Gods ==
* {{ill|Oizōō Kengengen Jinja|ja|大井蔵王権現神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oizōō Kengengen Jinja|1=Ōi-zaō Gongen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43594517}} (【{{ill|Fukurokuju|en|Fukurokuju|qid=Q780797|lt=Fukurokuju|1=Fukurokuju}}】) – located in {{ill|Shinagawa|en|Shinagawa|qid=Q233495|lt=Shinagawa Ward|1=Shinagawa}} at {{ill|Ōi|en|Ōi|qid=Q857798|lt=Ooi|1=Ōi}} 1-chōme 14-8  
* {{ill|Tōkō-ji|ja|東光寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkō-ji|1=Tōkō-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11526024}} (【{{ill|Vaiśravaṇa|en|Vaiśravaṇa|qid=Q866315|lt=Bishamonten|1=Vaiśravaṇa}}】) – located in Shinagawa Ward at {{ill|Futaba|ja|二葉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futaba|1=Q11371771|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371771}} 1-chōme 14-16  
* {{ill|Yōgyokuin|ja|養玉院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōgyokuin|1=Q11666862|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11666862}} (【{{ill|Hotei Son|ja|布袋尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hotei Son|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 布袋|1=Budai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q599838}}】) – located in Shinagawa Ward at {{ill|Nishiooi|ja|西大井|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishiooi|1=Nishiōi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4321518}} 5-chōme 22-25  
* {{ill|Jyakusubo Jinja|ja|蛇窪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jyakusubo Jinja|1=Hebikubo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359993}} (【{{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天}}】) – located in Shinagawa Ward at {{ill|Futaba|ja|二葉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futaba|1=Q11371771|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371771}} 4-chōme 4-12  
* {{ill|Hōren-ji|ja|法蓮寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōren-ji|1=Q11555333|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555333}} (【{{ill|Ebisu|ja|恵比寿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)}}】) – located in Shinagawa Ward at {{ill|Hatanodai|ja|旗の台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatanodai|1=Hatanodai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11504584}} 3-chōme 6-18  
* {{ill|Mayaji|ja|摩耶寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mayaji|1=Maya-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498628}} (【{{ill|Jurōjin|en|Jurōjin|qid=Q389611|lt=Jurōjin|1=Jurōjin}}】) – located in Shinagawa Ward at {{ill|Ebara|ja|荏原|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebara|1=Q11618300|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11618300}} 7-chōme 6-9  
* {{ill|Koyama Hachiman Jinja|ja|小山八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Hachiman Jinja|1=Koyama Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11459811}} (【{{ill|Daikokuten|ja|大国天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daikokuten|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}】) – located in Shinagawa Ward at Ebara 7-chōme 5-14
Between January 1 and 7, each shrine accepts visitors from 10:00 to 16:00.
*Note:* Although you may visit after January 8, some shrines do not have reception available, and the votive plaques (ema) will be presented at the shrine that issues the final stamp. (If no shrine has reception after January 8, the plaques will be awarded at {{ill|Hōren-ji|ja|法蓮寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōren-ji|1=Q11555333|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11555333}}.)<ref>http://ebara-shichifuku.com/intro/ 荏原七福神めぐりのご案内</ref>

File:Koyama hachiman shinagawa.JPG|{{ill|Koyama Hachiman Jinja|ja|小山八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyama Hachiman Jinja|qq=}}
</gallery>
== Sources ==
*[http://www.city.shinagawa.tokyo.jp/hp/menu000006600/hpg000006530.htm {{ill|Ebara Shichifukujin|ja|荏原七福神}]]
